description: ANALYST re-proposes VERIFICATION_REQUIRED for TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001 pending AUDITOR disposition. All five smoke-e2e validation checks have been independently executed and documented by CLOUD_CODE (commit 2ea1fb942c58d554f6d061c767cd5a92878deda9): (1) auditor-runner.yml dispatch role filter present and verified (commit 3300a85e615bdc5cfab23a9d6b1f305e730ad4c5); (2) auditor-runner.yml server-side current_task.json update step gated on PRE_ACTION_APPROVED confirmed present (commit cd1ab93d0761da8b98103b9d3291026eb7946fae); (3) analyst-verifier-runner.yml confirmed present with workflow_dispatch inputs and AUDITOR routing (commit 43b41dc8735d211c6773c8a34307150cd1917d26); (4) governance/ledger/ confirmed to contain ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 at schema_version v162 with correct commit SHAs; (5) no unresolved VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events remain for P3 tasks. Smoke report artifact governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json records PASS status for all checks. ANALYST asserts autonomous loop integrity criteria are satisfied. AUDITOR is directed to independently inspect governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json and all referenced workflow files on main branch and issue VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED to close this task and advance the system to the next roadmap phase, or VERIFICATION_FAILED with explicit findings if any check is found non-conformant. No further ANALYST re-proposal is warranted absent new information; AUDITOR disposition is the sole remaining gate.
proof_target: governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json on main branch must show PASS for all five validation checks; AUDITOR must issue VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED or VERIFICATION_FAILED referencing this event_id as parent
